_comment: Liquid template for Hightouch HTTP Request sync → POST /api/ingest/users. Paste into the JSON editor in the sync configuration.
_notes: Hightouch Liquid does NOT support the 'present' filter — use raw string values for nullable fields.
funnel_stage is a top-level field (not inside attributes) so the ingest route can apply persona assignment overrides: lapsed/lapsed_mau → Returning persona.

Profile columns use lowercase (user_id, first_name, last_name, email, last_seen_timestamp, language_tag, plan_locale_latest, text_bible_version_id_latest, donor_alias_ids_all, source_application, verified_flag, suspended_timestamp).
Trait columns use title case with spaces (e.g. 'Preferred Channel Overall 30 Days').
donor_alias_ids_all must be quoted as a string — some users have multiple IDs which would render as unquoted comma-separated values and break JSON parsing.
preferred_bible_version_id uses default: 'null' (unquoted) so it renders as JSON null, not the string 'null'.
